# Extração: 08.02-Intersting Stories_Interesting Mechanisms

---

BIG idea = interesting story +
unique mechanism + one
primary promise
Interesting story - personal story, cover-up story,
terrifying story, a story about their enemy, embarrassing
story, shameful story etc…
The difference between an emotionally INTERESTING
story and a regular story is night and day in conversions.
Unique mechanism - what makes the thing you’re selling
different (if its the same as everything else, you need to
rename it so it sounds different)
Primary promise - what is the #1 main promise you’re
making (not 5-6 benefits, but the one main promise that
you will repeat over and over)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 6 --

Herbal Healing
Story - Harvard researcher studies supplements and discovers over 500 of
them are contaminated with dangerous drugs, illegal substances and more
Promise - Fix your toughest health problems like arthritis, memory loss,
heart disease and more
Mechanism - Safe and proven herbal remedies
-------
John Carlton - 1 leg golfer ad
Story - 1 legged golfer was hitting the ball further and straighter than
anyone he’d ever seen
Promise - Slash strokes off your game
Mechanism - the “triple coil” swing he learned from the 1 legged golfer
------
Patriot Power Greens
Story - How old guys in an elite Coast Guard unit in San Diego started
beating the young guys in PT tests
Promise - get back the vitality and youthful energy you had 10-15 years
ago
Mechanism - a green drink that fights inflammation
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 6 --

Canadian Social Security
Story - A new opportunity for Americans to take part in the Canadian social
security system.
Promise: Collect monthly checks of $400 - $4700 (this is an EASY,
done-for-you promise that people love)
Mechanism - Access to “Canadian Social Security.” (this is simply an
annuity that is similar to Canadian Social Security so they renamed it to
make it sound more interesting and sexy)
----
Lift Factor
Story - A middle aged woman discovers her daughter’s boyfriend broke up
with her because he said “all women wind-up looking like their mother, and
your mom is old”
Promise: Erase 20 years of aging in 7 minutes
Mechanism - NAD (which they call the “Radiant DNA” secret)
----
Self Defense John Carlton Ad
Story - a guy gets jumped in an Oklahoma bar filled with neo-nazis and
skinheads
Promise - how to protect yourself in any fight no matter how small you are
